THERE IS STREET FLOODING AND ROAD WASHOUTS BETWEEN CHAUTAUQUA AND ELGIN. THE LITTLE CANEY RIVER IS OUT OF ITS BANKS AT NIOTAZE AND FLOODING SIDE DIRT ROADS. FLOODING IS OCCURRING ON BOTH SIDES OF HIGHWAY 166.
COUNTY ROAD 3900 SOUTH OF DEARING IS CLOSED DUE TO FLOODING.

TWO WATER RESCUES OCCURRED IN THE COFFEYVILLE AREA TODAY. A FAMILY WAS EVACUATED FROM THEIR HOME ALONG THE PUMPKIN CREEK EAST OF COFFEYVILLE. ADDITIONALLY...THEIR WAS A WATER RESCUE INVOLVING A SUBMERGED VEHICLE ALONG THE ONION CREEK SOUTH OF COFFEYVILLE. IN BOTH INSTANCES...NO INJURIES WERE REPORTED.
